entryType: Entry appears to be into living area with central hall access to bedroom wing
kitchenLocation: Central location with adjacency to dining area and living room, galley-style layout
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with primary bedroom separated from two secondary bedrooms clustered together
bathroomPlacement: back-to-back bathrooms share plumbing wall - one ensuite with primary bedroom, one hall bath serving secondary bedrooms
efficiencyNotes: built-in storage integrated into living area
uniqueFeatures: kitchen centrally located for easy access from all areas
built-in storage spans width of living area
dimensionNotes: Efficient rectangular plan with primary bedroom (13'-1.25" wide) taking full depth, secondary bedrooms are modest but functional, living area is generous for the overall footprint, galley kitchen is narrow but well-planned
